title: iliamna rivularis var. cismontana
intro: Iliamna rivularis var. cismontana, also known as Iliamna, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in saponins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. Iliamna can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
